mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO alarm_video_slices ( video_id, slice_id, start_time_sec, duration_sec, slice_file_path, file_size_bytes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
(#{item.videoId}, #{item.sliceId}, #{item.startTimeSec}, #{item.durationSec}, #{item.sliceFilePath}, #{item.fileSizeBytes}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_video_slices SET video_id = #{videoId}, slice_id = #{sliceId}, start_time_sec = #{startTimeSec}, duration_sec = #{durationSec}, slice_file_path = #{sliceFilePath}, file_size_bytes = #{fileSizeBytes}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
